about this one particular

very different this time
around. It's that LLMs like
flip they flip the direction
of technology diffusion that
is usually present in
technology. So for example
with electricity,
cryptography, computing,
flight, internet, GPS, lots of
new transformative
technologies that have not
been around. Typically it is
the government and
corporations that are the
first users because it's new
and expensive etc. and it only

but I feel like LLMs are kind
of like flipped around.
